query: Plan my trip from Singapore to Tokyo on a $1200 budget with max comfort.
I have 5 days off and $800. Should I go to Bali or stay local in Bangkok? I want relaxation and good food.
I have $10,000 to invest. Should I put it in index funds, crypto, or a high-yield savings account? I need the money in 2 years.
Should I pay off my $15k student loan early at 4.5% interest or invest the extra $500/month in the stock market?
I got two job offers: a $120k remote role at a startup or a $95k hybrid role at a big tech company with better benefits. Which should I take?
Should I quit my stable job to pursue a 3-month coding bootcamp? I have 6 months of savings and hate my current role.
We have a SaaS product with 500 users. Should we launch a mobile app, add an API for integrations, or focus on reducing churn with better onboarding?
Our e-commerce conversion rate is 1.8%. Should we invest in A/B testing the checkout flow, adding social proof, or offering free shipping over $50?
Our team of 6 has a tight Q2 deadline. Should we hire 2 contractors, ask the team to work overtime, or cut scope by 30%?
We have $50k budget for infrastructure. Should we migrate to Kubernetes, stay on EC2 with auto-scaling, or go serverless with Lambda?
